name: Vislink Technologies, Inc.
description: Vislink Technologies, Inc. is a global leader in the development and distribution of advanced live video transmission and data communication technologies. The company specializes in providing mission-critical solutions, including premium RF and 5G transmitters, wireless camera systems, and AI-driven production tools. Serving diverse sectors such as defense, public safety, sports, and broadcast news, Vislink delivers secure, high-quality, and low-latency video solutions that enhance situational awareness and operational efficiency. Headquartered in Mt. Olive, New Jersey, the company supports global operations with a comprehensive portfolio of hardware and software designed for demanding, real-time production environments.
